settings.value: Start Your Own Local Electrical Lead-Generation Business
Electrical Leads — Local Electrical Lead-Generation Platform
Launch a branded lead-gen website that connects homeowners with local electricians. Get help with setup, marketing, and generating electrical leads in your area.
Start Your Own Local Electrical Lead-Generation Business
Launch a branded website that connects homeowners with local electricians — and get help setting it up, marketing it, and generating leads in your area.
We help entrepreneurs launch and grow a local lead-gen platform for electricians, wiring pros, and electrical contractors.

[{"id":"s2","headline":"A Smarter Way to Build an Electrical Lead-Gen Business","body":"We give you the system to run your own local electrical lead-generation platform without building the technology from scratch.

You operate the website, attract homeowners who need electrical work and installations, and connect them with licensed electricians in your market.

consumer.title: Describe Your Project
consumer.description: Tell us what you need — electrical details and your ZIP code. Takes less than 2 minutes.

consumer.title: Get Matched Instantly
consumer.description: We instantly match you with verified local electricians in your area who specialize in exactly what you need.

consumer.title: Compare & Choose
consumer.description: Receive up to 4 quotes. Compare pricing, read real reviews, and pick the electrician you trust most.

consumer.title: Job Done Right
consumer.description: Your electrician handles the work. Leave a verified review to help your neighbors find great pros too.

pro.title: Create Your Profile
pro.description: Sign up, list your electrical services, add photos of your work, and set up your business profile in minutes.

pro.title: Set Your Service Area
pro.description: Choose the ZIP codes and cities you want to serve. Only receive electrical leads from your target area.

pro.title: Receive Qualified Leads
pro.description: Get notified instantly when a homeowner in your area requests electrical work. Pay only for leads you want.

pro.title: Win More Business
pro.description: Respond fast, send a quote, and close the job. Build your reputation with every 5-star review.
